jobs.title: Account Executive - EU
jobs.content: <h2><strong>This is Sales at Typeform</strong></h2><p>We're expanding our team of dynamic and driven Account Executives at Typeform, and we're searching for exceptional talent to help us elevate our EU sales motion.</p><p>The EU Account Executive partners with companies across the SaaS & B2B segments to deliver the Typeform conversational form-builder platform.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
jobs.content: <h2><strong>This is Product at Typeform</strong></h2><p>The Senior Product Designer partners with engineering, research & product management to deliver the next generation of Typeform's conversational form-builder, payments & scheduling features.</p><p>You'll own the design strategy for one of Typeform's flagship product surfaces.</p>
